summary: Re-validated 'Ventas por Categoría' report end-to-end after 3 fixes (isMobile hook, Fragment key, Admin PIN). Duplicate-render regression is FIXED: every data-testid (by-category-report, by-category-table, grand-total-row, expand-all-btn, collapse-all-btn, download-pdf-btn, download-xlsx-btn) resolves to EXACTLY 1 element on desktop 1920, tablet 768, android 412 and mobile 390. No React 'Each child in a list should have a unique key' warnings. Expand/Collapse and category row toggle work WITHOUT force=True. Admin PIN 11338585 logs in successfully. Pie chart and hierarchical table render correctly with TOTAL GENERAL = RD$25,100.00 / 76 (matches 15,100+10,000 and 56+20). HOWEVER, a NEW HIGH-priority bug was uncovered: clicking 'Descargar PDF' / 'Descargar Excel' buttons throws a runtime error and displays 'Error generando PDF' modal — root cause is that ByCategoryReport.jsx reads localStorage.getItem('token') but the app stores the auth token under key 'pos_token', so the Authorization header is empty and the backend returns 401.

ui_bugs.issue: localStorage.getItem('token') returns null because the actual key is 'pos_token'. Result: /api/reports/xlsx/ventas-por-categoria/pdf and /xlsx are called WITHOUT Authorization header → backend returns 401 → axios throws → 'Error generando PDF/XLSX' modal is shown. Users cannot download PDF or Excel from the Ventas por Categoría report.

integration_issues.issue: Wrong localStorage key used for JWT token. Fetch with the correct 'pos_token' returns 200 + valid blob (confirmed on backend in iter 149). Frontend just needs to use the same key as the rest of the app (see LoginPOS and other modules — all use 'pos_token').

action_items: Fix /app/frontend/src/pages/reports/ByCategoryReport.jsx line 9: change localStorage.getItem('token') → localStorage.getItem('pos_token') so Authorization header is sent correctly for PDF/XLSX downloads.
Audit other report components (DailySalesReport, CashCloseReport, TopProductsReport, etc.) for the same bug — they likely share the same headers() helper pattern and may all be broken.
Consider extracting headers() into a shared /lib/auth.js helper to avoid this class of bug.
critical_code_review_comments: Token key inconsistency: Reports.js, LoginPOS, and most modules use 'pos_token' in localStorage; ByCategoryReport.jsx (and likely siblings under pages/reports/) use 'token'. This is the sole reason PDF/XLSX downloads fail from the UI even though backend endpoints are 100% green.
The download() function catches the axios error silently ('catch {}') losing the real error. Should log err for easier debugging (catch (err) { console.error(err); notify.error(...) }).
Responsive fix (isMobile hook with matchMedia) is clean and correct — branch is mutually exclusive via {isMobile && ...}{!isMobile && (<>...</>)}. No duplicate DOM. Good fix.
Fragment key fix is correctly applied — imported Fragment from 'react' and used <Fragment key={`cat-${i}`}>. No more React key warnings in console.

success_rate.backend: 100% (from iter 149, not re-run here per request)
success_rate.frontend: 85% (all duplicate-render regression checks pass on 4 viewports; PDF/XLSX download UI broken — 2 HIGH bugs)

test_credentials: Admin PIN 11338585 confirmed working (stored in /app/memory/test_credentials.md). Token stored under localStorage key 'pos_token'.
seed_data_creation: None — used existing jornada data (CERVEZAS 15,100 / HAMBURGUESA 10,000, qty 56/20). 'Este Mes' preset (2026-04-01 → 2026-04-20) has data.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Duplicate-render and React-key-warning fixes are CONFIRMED WORKING across desktop/tablet/android/mobile viewports. The only remaining HIGH bug is the PDF/XLSX download from ByCategoryReport failing with 401 due to wrong localStorage token key ('token' vs 'pos_token'). After E1 fixes the key, re-test by clicking Descargar PDF / Descargar Excel and verify: (a) no 'Error generando' modal, (b) success toast 'PDF descargado' / 'XLSX descargado', (c) a blob download is triggered with PDF magic '%PDF' and XLSX magic 'PK'.
rca of the issue: RCA — Download buttons fail: ByCategoryReport.jsx line 9 does `const token = localStorage.getItem('token');` but the LoginPOS flow stores the JWT under 'pos_token'. Inspection of localStorage after admin login returned keys: ['pos_offline_user','pos_branding','pos_theme_cache','pos_token','...','pos_user_ui_prefs'] — no plain 'token'. Consequently the headers() helper returns `{}`, axios GETs the /pdf and /xlsx endpoints without Authorization, FastAPI returns 401, axios rejects, catch block fires notify.error('Error generando PDF'). Fix: replace 'token' with 'pos_token' in ByCategoryReport.jsx (and any other report component using the same pattern).
